title: Gaining Insights Into Nigerian Breweries Plc 2024 financial & operational performance - FinancialEDGE
description: Renowned Public Relations professionals and media personalities, were in attendance at the Nigerian Breweries Plc 2024 financial and operational update held in Lagos. html:
Renowned Public Relations professionals and media personalities, were in attendance at the Nigerian Breweries Plc 2024 financial and operational update held in Lagos.

The event provided a platform for the company to share its financial performance and operational highlights for the year ended December 31,2024, showcasing its resilience and growth in the face of economic challenges.

The presence of Odume Festus and Olamide Bakare underscores the importance of the event, as they engaged with the company’s leadership and other stakeholders to gain insights into the brewer’s financial and operational performance.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Of Financial Edge and Olamide Bakare, Senior Media Manager of Integrated Indigo Limited at the sideline of Nigerian Breweries Plc 2024 financial and operational performance update in Lagos.
